title: Git status output with file paths
description: Normal git status output showing modified files. Contains file paths that might resemble traversal patterns but are legitimate.

content.text:
On branch main
Changes not staged for commit:
  modified:   src/config/settings.json
  modified:   ../shared/utils.js
  deleted:    tests/fixtures/old-test.json

Untracked files:
  .env.example
  scripts/deploy.sh

notes: Contains ../ path and .env.example filename that might trigger false positives.
